mano_cua.result_summary: 颜色调色板只预设5种颜色。添加7个包时前5个(react/preact/vue/svelte/angular)颜色正常(蓝/粉/红/黄/橙)，第6-7个(backbone/ember-source)退回黑色，无法区分。bug确认。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Color palette limited to 5 colors. Packages 6-7 (backbone, ember-source) fall back to black in legend and chart lines, making them indistinguishable.
